notes: IDF assessed Iran had ~2500 usable BMs at war start. Pre-June-2025 stock was ~3000 before prior conflict.
~128 BM from Iran toward Israel by end of Mar4 (5-day cumul). Source: BBC Arabic citing IDF/defense ministry. CONTESTED: Perplexity new reading of JINSA Mar5 implies 430 by Mar4. See conflicts.md.
IDF statement ~Mar10: ~300 BM launched at Israel total. Cited in JINSA Mar11 PDF. ~half contained cluster warheads. ~24 BM/day rate implied.

IAF precise figure from official IAF briefing (reported in Walla + N12/Mako article dated Mar18 but covering data through ~Mar10): 285 BMs toward Israel, 270 intercepted (>90% rate), 17 impact sites, 887 BMs global. More precise than ToI rounded '~300'. Our model cumul at Day11=301 — discrepancy of 16 BMs (~5%).

IDF/ToI per-day Phase I pattern: Day1=~90, Day2=~60, Days3-8=~20/day. CONTESTED: these sum to ~210 for Days1-5 vs BBC/IDF 128 anchor. Likely rounded figures used for narrative context. Recorded for completeness; see conflicts.md Phase I conflict.
~half of BMs at Israel carried cluster warheads by Mar10.
>290 BMs at Israel by Mar15 (INSS/FDD). Non-binding lower bound — already satisfied by Mar10 cumul=300.
92% aggregate interception rate confirmed by IDF. Applies to late March. No daily series available.
~10/day average by Mar24 (IDF via Wiki_HE). Consistent with JINSA: ~10-15/day over past week.
IDF: well over 70% of Iranian missile force neutralized (launched + destroyed on ground). JNS/IDF statement.
>450 BM at Israel (Times of Israel liveblog Mar27). Upgraded from >400 per earlier IDF/JNS statement.
